name: Nuernberger Rostbratwuerste
recipeIngredient: Natural sausage casing, approximately 1/2 inch diameter
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop the pork and veal on a cutting board (should be a bit coarser than ground meat).
2. Combine the chopped meats with caraway seed, nutmeg, marjoram, and salt.
3. Fill the carefully cleaned sausage casing with the mixture; twist the casing to form sausages every 3 1/4 inches.
4. The bratwurst tastes best when browned on all sides over charcoal.
5. Serve with sauerkraut and a German country style rye bread.
6. Enjoy with a hearty beer.
